title: Container Report - Week 47
summary:
Main
As we approach December, we traditionally see a slowdown in container throughput as shippers have stocked up for Christmas and will only look at replenishing their inventories in Q1. Many carriers are contemplating a return to transiting the Red Sea next year, but we will have to see who makes the move first. This follows the Houthis announcement that they have suspended their attacks on commercial shipping.
